daily_1y_gap.caveat: Effective ETF detail daily 1Y continuity uses true StockAnalysis primary first, then the verified R2 active selection. Fetchable gaps are the immediate backfill queue; inception-limited and terminal provider/data-supply states are tracked but do not block by themselves.

enforcement.caveat: Non-default reports, including daily_1y ETF continuity, keep incremental_plan consistency informational because exact ETF fetchable selection is emitted separately.

dispatch_plan.selection: explicit full-primary daily_1y fetchable tickers; not the scored-ETF scheduled plan

recommended_dispatch.note: Full-primary daily 1Y gaps are outside the exact scored-ETF scheduled plan. Use only the explicit single-writer shards after owner approval; no dispatch has been run.
